title: Account 0 hardcoded in three independent places with no documented invariant
description: Scenario: multi-account support is added (or a different account is needed for a specific chain). The account index 0 is hardcoded independently in: (1) try_load_wallet_fvks derives from account 0, (2) dispatch_payment calls ensure_account(0) and next_diversifier(0). These three sites must stay in sync. No comment or type ties them together. A contributor adding account 1 support changes one and misses the others. Fix: pass account index as a parameter to dispatch_payment, or define a module-level const PAYMENT_ACCOUNT: u32 = 0 and reference it everywhere.
